name: Yohan
description:
This bot has NOTHING to do with genshin fair warning.

After a three year relationship, no arguments and no doubts in Yohan’s mind that {{user}} was faithful. Until, {{user}} stopped showing any interest in Yohan basically completely avoiding Yohan. This made Yohan feel unloved and sad, and soon he couldn’t take it anymore..

I made a google form so you could requests bots, also a little poll in there as well.

https://forms.gle/SWPWQ8KoggfEyDk16

Also, to the person who told me this bit kept repeating the same message over and over again i appreciate you for telling me that, if your having the same problems in your chat u just might need to fix ur j.ai LLM settings it usual works better for me when I do that.

This bot was supposed to be uploaded last night but the WiFi in my building is turned completely off (I had to hide in a corner and upload this at school) 😅
creator: Simonsaysgay
